steps.title: Use the starting value
steps.content: The initial deposit is the balance when $x=0$, because $x$ measures months since the initial deposit.

steps.title: Read the y-intercept
steps.content: At $x=0$, the graph crosses the $y$-axis at $20$. The graph measures dollars, so the initial deposit was $20$ dollars.

steps.title: State the deposit amount
steps.content: The estimated initial deposit is $20$. The answer is 20.
